name: Morton's Caesar Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon freshly squeezed lemon juice (from the recipe)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a processor or blender, combine the first seven ingredients.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add Parmesan cheese and blend just until combined.
4. Season with salt to taste.
5. The salad can be prepared up to 2 days in advance.
6. Bring the dressing to room temperature before serving.
7. Add croutons just before tossing the salad.
